fields.returns: <see langword="true" /> if the segment was successfully extracted; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.

params.dst: The <see cref="T:SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder" /> that receives the extracted segment.
params.start: The distance along the path to begin the segment.
params.startWithMoveTo: <see langword="true" /> to prepend a move-to command at the start of the segment; otherwise, <see langword="false" />.
params.stop: The distance along the path to end the segment.

fields.summary: Extracts a segment of the path between two distances and writes it to the specified path builder.

entries.signature: public bool GetSegment (float start, float stop, SkiaSharp.SKPathBuilder dst, bool startWithMoveTo);
